narrative:
Miami Twp U (precinct in Montgomery County) has 821 registered voters, with 63.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
